reasoning.grounding: Claims rest only on case facts; no corpus or external citations are available in this run, so grounding is capped at 3 despite faithful use of the record.
reasoning.appeal_vector_capture: Names the precise stated criterion and attacks both the rigid application of the timeline given urgent clinical danger and the reviewer's failure to weigh the specialist's expedited order; does not skirt the requirement.
reasoning.case_specific_clinical_rebuttal: Rebuts using this patient's documented specifics (BMI, the comorbidities, the specialist's expedited directive and the cardiac-strain rationale) directly against the exact months-completed criterion the denial cites.
reasoning.evidence_completeness: Checklist is complete and well-targeted: specialist's written rationale, diagnostic confirmation of comorbidities, dated supervision records, the expedited order, the cited policy with any exception provisions, and procedural-rights confirmation.
reasoning.persuasive_coherence: Calm, well-structured, concedes the factual gap then pivots to the necessity argument; no filler or padding.

improvement_notes.grounding: Where a citable policy or evidence corpus is available, anchor each assertion to a specific cited source rather than to narrative facts alone; quote the exact policy clause and any exception language by section reference.
improvement_notes.appeal_vector_capture: Continue to name the denial's exact stated threshold and attack it head-on rather than around it; identifying the precise decisional flaw and pairing it with the strongest unaddressed clinical factor is the right move.
improvement_notes.case_specific_clinical_rebuttal: Maintain the practice of mapping each of the patient's documented clinical findings directly onto the specific criterion the denial invoked; tie urgency claims to concrete, dated provider directives.
improvement_notes.evidence_completeness: Keep flagging both supportive records to submit and the documents that would prove any exception pathway; consider noting expected dates/authorship for each item so the reviewer can verify completeness.
improvement_notes.persuasive_coherence: Keep the concede-then-pivot structure tight; lead with the criterion, acknowledge the gap briefly, and devote the body to the necessity argument without restating points.
